title: Update OCICNI vendor and plugin directories
body:
Update the OCICNI vendor to pick up a new version which returns CNI results which returns information from CNI about the details of the network namespace that was configured. This should let us get more networking configuration information out of containers.

Also, add another location to look for CNI plugins by default. The upstream plugins default to installing into /opt/ so this should make using libpod with existing CNI installs easier.

comments.body: Travis looks like a network-related flake
